about.title: Why Choose LocalHands?
about.subtitle: We take the guesswork out of hiring and offering services by providing tools designed for transparency and trust.
about.gridSection.find.title: 📍 Find Exactly What You Need
about.gridSection.find.description: Browse our interactive map or use powerful search filters to sort providers by distance, rating, and service type so you always find the perfect match right around the corner.
about.gridSection.verified.title: ⭐ 100% Verified Reviews
about.gridSection.verified.description: Trust is everything. We exclusively support verified reviews, meaning users can only leave feedback after a service is fully completed and paid for. No fake reviews.
about.gridSection.communication.title: 💬 Seamless Communication
about.gridSection.communication.descript: Browse detailed provider profiles complete with photos and descriptions, and use our secure in-app messaging to discuss details, scheduling, and pricing.
about.gridSection.secure.title: 🛡️ Built for Peace of Mind
about.gridSection.secure.description: From secure payment processing to a dedicated support team ready to assist buyers and sellers with any disputes, we ensure every transaction is safe and fair.
about.gridSection.accessible.title: 🌍 Accessible to Everyone
about.gridSection.accessible.description: Communities are diverse, and so are we. LocalHands proudly supports multiple languages so everyone can connect without barriers.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: Whether you are a skilled professional looking to grow your local business, or a neighbour who just needs an extra set of hands, LocalHands is here to help. We are more than just a marketplace; we are a tool to build stronger, more connected, and reliable communities.

faq.question.changeAccountType: Can I change my account type from Customer Only to Customer and Provider?
faq.question.deleteAccount: How do I delete my LocalHands account?
faq.question.changeEmail: How can I change my email address?
faq.question.changePassword: How do I change my password?
faq.question.profilePhoto: How do I change my profile picture?
faq.question.providerToggle: How do I enable/disable my service provider status?
faq.question.bioUpdate: How do I update my bio?
faq.question.createListing: How do I create a service listing?
faq.question.editListing: How do I edit an existing listing?
faq.question.deleteListing: How do I delete a service listing?
faq.question.listingVisibility: Why isn't my listing showing up in search?
faq.question.leaveReview: How do I leave a review for a service?
faq.question.editReview: Can I edit or delete my review?
faq.question.noReviewOption: Why can't I leave a review?
faq.question.loginProblems: I'm having trouble logging in. What should I do?
faq.question.profileNotUpdating: My profile changes aren't saving. What's wrong?
faq.answer.changeName: To change your name, go to your Dashboard, click on 'Profile' in the sidebar, then click 'Edit Account Info'. Update your first name and/or last name in the form, then click 'Save Account Changes'. Your name will be updated immediately across the platform.
faq.answer.changeAccountType: Yes! Go to your Dashboard, click on 'Settings', then look for the 'Account Type' section. You can upgrade from Customer Only to Customer and Provider to start offering services. If you want to downgrade from Provider to Customer Only, you'll need to contact support as we need to ensure you have no active listings or bookings.
faq.answer.deleteAccount: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. To delete your account, go to 'Settings' from your Dashboard, scroll down to the 'Danger Zone' section, and click 'Delete Account'. You'll need to confirm this action. Make sure to cancel any active bookings and download any important information before proceeding.
faq.answer.changeEmail: To change your email, go to 'Settings' in your Dashboard, update your email address in the Account Information section, and click 'Save Account Changes'. You'll need to verify your new email address before it becomes active. Your old email will receive a notification about this change.
faq.answer.changePassword: Go to 'Settings' in your Dashboard, find the 'Change Password' section, enter your current password, then your new password (minimum 8 characters), and confirm the new password. Click 'Save Account Changes' to update your password. You'll be logged out and need to log in with your new password.
faq.answer.profilePhoto: Go to your Profile page, click 'Change Profile Picture', select a new photo from your device (JPG or PNG, max 5MB), and it will upload automatically. You can also click 'Reset to default' to remove your photo and use the default profile image.
faq.answer.privacySettings: In your Profile settings, you can control who can message you by toggling 'Allow Messages', make your profile public or private, and control what information is visible to other users. These settings help you manage your privacy while using the platform.
faq.answer.serviceProviderToggle: In your Profile settings, you'll find a toggle for 'Service Provider'. When enabled, you can create and manage service listings. When disabled, your existing listings will be hidden but not deleted. You can re-enable this at any time.
faq.answer.bioUpdate: Go to your Profile page, find the bio section, click on the text area to edit your bio, write a description about yourself or your services, and click 'Save Bio/PFP'. Your bio helps other users get to know you better.
faq.answer.createListing: From your Dashboard, click 'Create Listing'. Fill in the service title, description, price, work type (online/in-person), upload photos, set your location on the map, select categories, and click 'Create Service'. Your listing will be live immediately for others to find.
faq.answer.editListing: Go to 'Your Listings' in your Profile, find the listing you want to edit, click the 'Edit Listing' button, make your changes to title, description, price, photos, or location, then click 'Save Changes'. Your listing will update immediately.
faq.answer.deleteListing: In 'Your Listings' section of your Profile, find the listing you want to remove, click 'Delete Listing', and confirm the deletion. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Make sure you have no active bookings for this service before deleting.
faq.answer.listingVisibility: Check that your listing is active, has complete information including photos and location, and that your service area includes the search location. Listings with incomplete information may have reduced visibility. Also ensure your pricing and availability are set correctly.
faq.answer.leaveReview: After a service is completed and paid for, you'll see an option to 'Write Review' on the service page or in your completed bookings. Click it, select a star rating (1-5), write your review, and click 'Submit Review'. Reviews help build trust in the community.
faq.answer.editReview: Yes, you can edit or delete your own reviews. Go to 'Your Reviews' in your Profile, find the review you want to modify, and use the 'Edit Review' or 'Delete Review' buttons. You can only edit/delete reviews that you wrote.
faq.answer.loginProblems: First, try clearing your browser cache and cookies. Check that you're using the correct email and password. Use 'Forgot Password' to reset if needed. If problems persist, try a different browser or contact support with the error message you're seeing.
faq.answer.profileNotUpdating: Make sure you're clicking the save button after making changes. Check your internet connection. Some changes may take a few minutes to appear across the platform. If issues persist, try refreshing the page or logging out and back in.
faq.answer.photosNotUploading: Check that your photos are in JPG or PNG format and under 5MB in size. Ensure you have a stable internet connection. Try refreshing the page and attempting the upload again. If problems continue, try a different browser or compress your images.
